findings.description: Title validation accepted whitespace-only strings. `!title` catches empty string but `'   '` is truthy.
findings.fix_description: Added `title.trim().length === 0` check in both campaign and task creation endpoints.

findings.description: findCampaignGlobally() scans all user directories for every public GET /campaigns/:id request. O(N) where N = number of users.
findings.fix_description: Acceptable for MVP. Low traffic expected. Can add in-memory index later if needed.

findings.description: Router adds its own express.json() middleware. This is redundant if webchat.ts already applies it globally, but safe as a guard.
findings.fix_description: No action needed. Express.json() is idempotent and ensures bounty-api works even if mounted differently in future.

summary: Code quality is good. Clean architecture with dependency injection, proper TypeScript types, TSDoc comments. One functional fix applied (whitespace title). Two low-severity items accepted for MVP.
